description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, rectangular layout. The property is surrounded by a white fence and features a well-maintained lawn, a driveway, and a detached garage. The front facade includes large windows, a central entrance, and a porch area, while the rear and side yards are landscaped with trees, shrubs, and a small gazebo. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of light-colored materials, likely stucco and wood paneling, with some brick accents. The roof is flat and appears to have skylights or glass sections, allowing natural light into the interior. The overall design emphasizes open space, clean lines, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped yards, and a detached garage, surrounded by a white fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, driveway, and garage doors, with a clear view of the front lawn and fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated lawn, gazebo, and the side profile of the bungalow with grouped windows and landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, gazebo, and a prominent tree, with the back facade's windows and patio area visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional driveway, and the arrangement of windows and doors along the side wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
